message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-fd90.30

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -461,7 +461,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.28","title":"test(readme): SqlIfExists::Append + SqlInsertMethod::Multi coverage","description":"SqlIfExists has 3 variants (Fail/Replace/Append) but only Fail + Replace are exercised. Append is the most common incremental-load case for write_sql.

SqlInsertMethod has 2 variants (Single/Multi); only Single is tested.

Plan: extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite to:
- write_sql with Append after Fail/Replace, verify row count grows
- write_sql_with_options with method=Multi, verify the row written","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:45:20.951124853Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:47:05.735441442Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:47:05.733315424Z","close_reason":"completed: Append + Multi covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.28","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:45:20.951124853Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.29","title":"test(readme): JoinType (Left/Right/Outer/Cross) + MergeValidateMode (OneToMany/ManyToOne/ManyToMany) coverage","description":"Self-review of join surface: only JoinType::Inner and MergeValidateMode::OneToOne are exercised by integration tests. The 4 other JoinType variants (Left, Right, Outer, Cross) and the 3 other MergeValidateMode variants (OneToMany, ManyToOne, ManyToMany) have ZERO coverage despite being core pandas merge surface.

A regression in any of these variants — for example, Outer-join row count or ManyToMany validation behavior — would not surface.

Plan: add readme_join_type_round_trip:
- For each JoinType: build df1+df2 with overlapping keys, run merge_dataframes_on, assert expected row count
- For each MergeValidateMode: drive merge_with_options with frames whose cardinality matches/violates the mode","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:53:45.193296715Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:55:33.798985387Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:55:33.796530446Z","close_reason":"completed: JoinType + MergeValidateMode variants covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.29","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:53:45.193296715Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.30","title":"test(readme): AsofDirection (Forward/Nearest) + DuplicateKeep (Last/None) + ConcatJoin::Outer coverage","description":"Self-review caught 5 enum variants across 3 enums with zero integration test coverage:

- AsofDirection::Forward (nearest succeeding match in merge_asof)
- AsofDirection::Nearest (closest match in either direction)
- DuplicateKeep::Last (keep the last occurrence)
- DuplicateKeep::None (drop ALL duplicate occurrences)
- ConcatJoin::Outer (concat with outer index alignment)

Plan: extend existing tests or add readme_minor_enum_variants_round_trip exercising each variant against frames/series with detectable behavior.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:56:44.153158027Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:57:19.177973146Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.30","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:56:44.153158027Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- AsofDirection::Forward (nearest succeeding match in merge_asof)
- AsofDirection::Nearest (closest match in either direction)
- DuplicateKeep::Last (keep the last occurrence)
- DuplicateKeep::None (drop ALL duplicate occurrences)
- ConcatJoin::Outer (concat with outer index alignment)

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","title":"fp-io SQL table columns index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns helpers that combine pandas-style columns projection with index_col promotion, including chunksize support. Reuse table/column validation and SqlIndexedChunkIterator, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, index promotion, None behavior, missing index_col validation, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.256718983Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.254823083Z","close_reason":"Completed in 49678e3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
